holdings.infoBox: FSTA is an equity ETF with a total of 98 individual holdings. The top holdings are Walmart stock at 14.59%, Costco Wholesale at 11.75%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 8.88%, The Coca-Cola Company at 7.73%, and PepsiCo at 4.41%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Consumer Staples Index ETF (FSTA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA IMI Consumer Staples 25/50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of US consumer staples companies across the entire market-cap spectrum. FSTA was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.
infoTable: MSCI USA IMI Consumer Staples 25/50 Index

data.title: Consumer Non-Cyclical ETFs Outperform
data.text: Consumer staples stocks are living up to their defensive billing. Gain exposure to the group using these three ETFs.
